---
title: "Watch Your Basket - To Determine CEO Compensation"
author:
  - name: Neal Galpin
    equal-contributor: true
  - name: Hae Won (Henny) Jung
    equal-contributor: true
  - name: Lyndon Moore
    equal-contributor: true
  - name: Ekaterina Volkova
    equal-contributor: true
date: "2019-09-01"
categories: [CEO compensation, corporate governance]
description: "**Financial Management** (2019)"
---

<p style="color:darkred; text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-style:italic;">Financial Management (2019)</p>

<div class="btn-links" style="margin: 1.5rem 0;">
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/fima.12243" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">DOI</a>
<a href="https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=3014572" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">SSRN PDF (Free Access)</a>
<a href="https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/abs/10.1111/fima.12243" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">Published Version</a>
</div>

## Abstract

This paper examines how the composition of CEO compensation benchmarking peer groups affects executive pay. We document how firms strategically select peer groups and the implications for CEO compensation outcomes.
